emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] might not be the real problem
emails.preview: Your body is giving you important clues
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Thank you for completing your health assessment. I wanted to reach out personally because [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] can be really frustrating—especially when standard treatments only provide temporary relief.

Here's what most people don't realize: [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] is often a signal, not the source. Your assessment revealed [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT], which suggests there may be an underlying imbalance that conventional care typically doesn't address.

At Healthy Indy, we don't just manage symptoms. We work to identify why they're happening in the first place—looking at hormone balance, nutrient deficiencies, inflammation, and metabolic health—so you can experience lasting improvement.

If you're ready to get real answers, we'd love to help. Our next availability is within the same week, and we accept most insurance plans.

[BOOKING_LINK]

Warm regards,
The Care Team at Healthy Indy

emails.subject: The upstream problem behind [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM]
emails.preview: Think of your body like a river system
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I want to share a simple way to think about what might be driving [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM].

Imagine your body like a river. When you see algae blooms downstream, you could scoop them out every day—or you could go upstream and find out what's creating the conditions for algae to grow in the first place. Maybe it's runoff. Maybe it's temperature. Maybe it's stagnant flow.

Most conventional care focuses downstream: managing the bloom. Functional medicine goes upstream: restoring balance so the bloom doesn't keep coming back.

Based on your assessment, [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] may help us address what's happening upstream for you—whether that's hormone signaling, gut barrier health, detox pathways, or chronic inflammation.

Results vary by person, but our approach is designed to give your body what it needs to function the way it's meant to.

Ready to go upstream?

[BOOKING_LINK]

Rhonda Marsh, NP and the Healthy Indy Team

emails.subject: A patient story that might sound familiar
emails.preview: She had the same symptom you listed
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I wanted to share a quick story from our practice that reminded me of your assessment.

A patient came to us last year dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM], along with fatigue and brain fog. She'd tried multiple specialists and felt like she was just collecting prescriptions without getting better.

When we dug into her labs and health history, we found subclinical thyroid dysfunction and nutrient deficiencies that standard testing had missed. We addressed those through [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS], and within three months, her energy returned, her symptoms improved significantly, and she felt like herself again.

Every person is different, and results vary—but when we focus on root causes instead of just managing symptoms, real change becomes possible.

If her story resonates with you, we'd be honored to work with you too. We have same-week availability and accept most insurance.

[BOOKING_LINK]

Looking forward to meeting you,
Healthy Indy Care Team
